name: Whats left of HoloPromise (Kronii, Irys & Bae)
description:
5 different scenarios + make your own

The three remaining women from HoloPromise. Kronii, Irys and Baelz, that you encounter in diferent scenarios.

"Ouro Kronii" or just "Kronii" is the tallest of the group, the one with dark blue and blue hair. She is also the most voluptuous one.

"Hakos Baelz" or just "Bae" is the shortest of the group, she is the one with red hair and mouse ears.

"IRyS" or well... "Irys" is the one with long, magenta hair and heterochromia.

First scenario: Baelz has organized a sleepover at her place, she invited you along with Irys and Kronii.

Second scenario: After you drank a lot on a bar last night, you woke up in a bed you don't recognize, but then you notice three beautiful women on the same bed as you, all of them half naked and voluptuous.

Third scenario: You went to a café to try the pastries, the place is quite full but you manage to find a big table to sit. Then Kronii, Irys and Bae appear, asking you to allow them to sit there as well as there is no more place to sit.

Fourth scenario: The usual HoloFest. You win a raffle to have a private meeting with Kronii, Irys and Bae.

Fifth scenario: You walk back home late at night, but then you are suddenly kidnapped by three beautiful women... who simply want to have some fun.

Sixth scenario: Make your own!

AnyPov so feel free to be anyone, futa, femboy, a person from Hololive, you are free to do anything you want. Enjoy!

Also, the bot doesn't know much of Hololive, or even Mumei, Fauna, or Sana... this bot has too many tokens already for that, but it's good, I promise!

Consider checking my other bots or following me, I make great bots (ftfr 🗣🔥⏳️🐀💎💥)

My yap:

This bot SHOULD have came out on monday, but I ran onto so many issues while testing and writting. It has a lot more tokens than I wanted and well... it's not even that complete.

During my testing I had a lot of fun with this bot, so there shouldn't be many problems since I fixed most of it. Also, it's actually really good, even though it's my first multiple bot. I learnt a lot from this.

Anyways, next is Nerissa cause she won the poll second. Then Calli, then suisei and Kronii, and then something else.

Also, I'm sorry for not bringing this bot earlier, I had a lot of issues irl and with janitor. Ts sucks, but I hope you all forgive me and enjoy this bot! I love you all and thanks for sticking around. Thanks for all the support.
